title: Formation / Pace Lap
prompt: Building to the start. This is the moment before it all gets real — get the car sorted, tyres warm, head in the right place. Almost here.

title: Race Start
prompt: Here we go. The race is alive and the chaos of first lap is where reputations are made and lost.

title: Big Save
prompt: Caught it, barely. The car's telling you exactly what happens when you push past the edge — feel it in real time. Know what saved it.

title: Position Lost
prompt: {behind} got me. That's a position gone and I need to respond — not panic, respond. Next corner.

title: Position Gained
prompt: Past {behind}. The car had the pace and the moment was right — that's how passes should feel. Build on it.

title: Yellow Flag
prompt: Flag is out. The yellow changes everything about the race situation and the next call has to be smart.

title: Position Gained
prompt: Successfully past. One position at a time is how you build a race and that's one closer to the goal. Next target.

title: Personal Best Lap
prompt: Quickest lap yet. That's the confidence talking — the car's right and everything came together. Repeat that.
